description_for_human: AI-powered command center for peptide businesses — inventory, fulfillment, client management, payments, and AI assistant.
description_for_model: ThePeptideAI is a SaaS platform for peptide businesses. It provides AI-powered research (RAG search across peptide literature), inventory tracking (peptides, lots, bottles), order management and fulfillment, CRM with client portal, sales and commission tracking, protocol builder, multi-tenant vendor management, and Stripe payment processing. The AI assistant can answer peptide research questions and build new features on demand.
